label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure this out. The question is asking if following a series of instructions will bring me back to the starting point. I need to track my direction and movement step by step. First, I think I should assume I start facing a certain direction, maybe north, just to have a reference. Let's say North is my initial direction. Now, the first instruction is to "turn around." Turning around would mean a 180-degree turn, so I would face South. Next, the instruction says "turn left." If I'm facing South and I turn left, that would face me East. Wait,
